items.caption: A modern, sleek ac5 smart wireless dual-band wifi router. the router is designed with a minimalist aesthetic, boasting a black color and a matte finish. it has four antennas, two of which are prominently visible, suggesting a strong and stable wireless signal. the router is set against a backdrop of a blurred beach scene, with the ocean and waves subtly visible, adding a sense of tranquility to the image. the text overlay provides key features of the router, including its 1200m dual-band capabilities, app functionality, and easy setup. the overall impression is one of a high-quality, user-friendly device designed for seamless wireless connectivity.
A Google Wifi router and an iPhone 7 Plus are placed on a wooden surface, showcasing the devices' sleek designs and modern technology.

A laptop computer , and home wireless router (background) , which connects it to the Internet. The laptop has a WiFi wireless modem which transmits data to and receives data from the router, which passes the data on to the Internet through a cable connection provided by an Internet service provider (ISP). The Wifi modem has an automated radio transmitter which transmits packets of digital data by microwaves to a receiver in the router, and the router has a transmitter which transmits data packets back to the laptop. The router may also connect the laptop to other devices on the home network, such as a printer or another computer. The laptop's modem is an add-on card, visible as the turquoise device protruding from the left side.
items.creator: Clawed
